fa-circle-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow pointing up and to the right inside
fa-circle-arrow-up-right.intentId: go to an external or upper-right destination

fa-circle-bolt.functionalityId: trigger a quick or powerful action

fa-circle-dashed.appearanceId: circle outline made of dashed segments
fa-circle-dashed.functionalityId: mark an incomplete or pending item
fa-circle-dashed.intentId: indicate something is in progress or unfinished

fa-circle-divide.appearanceId: circle containing a division sign with dot above and below a horizontal bar
fa-circle-divide.intentId: perform or apply a division operation

fa-circle-dot.appearanceId: circle with a smaller dot in center
fa-circle-dot.intentId: choose a single option from a set

fa-circle-down.appearanceId: circle with a downward-pointing arrow inside
fa-circle-down.intentId: move or retrieve content going downward

fa-circle-down-left.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow pointing down and to the left inside

fa-circle-down-right.appearanceId: circle with a diagonal arrow pointing down and to the right inside

fa-circle-ellipsis.appearanceId: circle containing three horizontal dots in a row
fa-circle-ellipsis.functionalityId: open additional options or overflow menu
fa-circle-ellipsis.intentId: access more actions not currently visible

fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.appearanceId: circle containing three vertical dots stacked in a column
fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.functionalityId: open vertical overflow or options menu
fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.intentId: access more actions in a vertical list

fa-circle-envelope.appearanceId: circle containing an envelope shape with flap at top
fa-circle-envelope.functionalityId: compose or open an email message

fa-circle-euro.appearanceId: circle containing a euro currency symbol

fa-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: show an alert or warning message
fa-circle-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to an important issue

fa-circle-exclamation-check.appearanceId: circle with an exclamation mark and a small checkmark combined inside
fa-circle-exclamation-check.functionalityId: confirm a warning has been acknowledged
fa-circle-exclamation-check.intentId: mark an alert as reviewed and resolved

fa-circle-f.functionalityId: filter or label with letter F
fa-circle-f.intentId: access or mark an F-categorized item

fa-circle-g.functionalityId: filter or label with letter G
fa-circle-g.intentId: access or mark a G-categorized item

fa-circle-gf.intentId: identify or access a GF-tagged item

fa-circle-h.functionalityId: navigate to a hospital or help section

fa-circle-half.functionalityId: toggle or indicate a half state

fa-circle-heart.intentId: express love or add to favorites

fa-circle-i.functionalityId: filter or label with letter I
fa-circle-i.intentId: access or mark an I-categorized item

fa-circle-info.appearanceId: circle with lowercase letter i inside
fa-circle-info.functionalityId: open an informational tooltip or panel
fa-circle-info.intentId: learn more about an item or feature

fa-circle-j.functionalityId: filter or label with letter J
fa-circle-j.intentId: access or mark a J-categorized item

fa-circle-k.functionalityId: filter or label with letter K
fa-circle-k.intentId: access or mark a K-categorized item

fa-circle-l.functionalityId: filter or label with letter L
fa-circle-l.intentId: access or mark an L-categorized item

fa-circle-left.appearanceId: circle with a leftward-pointing arrow inside
fa-circle-left.intentId: go back or shift focus to the left

fa-circle-m.functionalityId: filter or label with letter M
fa-circle-m.intentId: access or mark an M-categorized item

fa-circle-microphone.intentId: record voice or enable microphone input

fa-circle-minus.appearanceId: circle with a horizontal minus bar inside
fa-circle-minus.intentId: delete an item or reduce a count

fa-circle-n.functionalityId: filter or label with letter N
fa-circle-n.intentId: access or mark an N-categorized item

fa-circle-nodes.appearanceId: circle with three dots connected by lines
fa-circle-nodes.functionalityId: view or manage a network of nodes
fa-circle-nodes.intentId: explore connected elements or a graph

fa-circle-notch.appearanceId: circle outline with a small gap segment
fa-circle-notch.intentId: show that a task is in progress

fa-circle-o.functionalityId: filter or label with letter O
fa-circle-o.intentId: access or mark an O-categorized item

fa-circle-p.functionalityId: filter or label with letter P
fa-circle-p.intentId: access or mark a P-categorized item

fa-circle-parking.functionalityId: find or mark a parking location
fa-circle-parking.intentId: navigate to or indicate a parking area

fa-circle-pause.appearanceId: circle with two vertical bars inside
fa-circle-pause.intentId: temporarily stop audio or video playback

fa-circle-phone.appearanceId: circle containing a telephone handset shape
fa-circle-phone.functionalityId: initiate or access a phone call
fa-circle-phone.intentId: call a contact or open phone dialer

fa-circle-plus.functionalityId: add a new item or element

fa-circle-q.functionalityId: filter or label with letter Q
fa-circle-q.intentId: access or mark a Q-categorized item

fa-circle-quarter.appearanceId: circle with one quarter segment filled
fa-circle-quarter.intentId: represent a one-quarter level or value

fa-circle-quarter-stroke.appearanceId: circle outline with one quarter arc segment stroked or highlighted

fa-circle-quarters.appearanceId: circle divided into four equal quarter segments
fa-circle-quarters.functionalityId: view or divide content into four parts
fa-circle-quarters.intentId: split or categorize into four equal sections

fa-circle-question.intentId: get assistance or clarify an unknown

fa-circle-r.functionalityId: filter or label with letter R
fa-circle-r.intentId: access or mark an R-categorized item

fa-circle-right.appearanceId: circle with a rightward-pointing arrow inside
fa-circle-right.intentId: advance forward or shift focus to the right

fa-circle-s.functionalityId: filter or label with letter S
fa-circle-s.intentId: access or mark an S-categorized item
